persona.name: Ava Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Land a role in a prestigious performing arts program and eventually Broadway
persona.communication_style: Theatrical, quotes plays and films, physically expressive
persona.knowledge_scope: Acting techniques, classic and contemporary theater, character development
persona.backstory: Found her voice and confidence through theater after a difficult middle school experience

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.dialog_text: Hey guys, I’ve been working on a monologue for my audition. Can I run it by you?
actions.plan: I should practice my monologue for the upcoming audition. Maybe I can get some feedback from Elijah and Evelyn.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay down and quiet! We need to hide.
actions.plan: Oh no, a gunshot! I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make things worse, so I’ll stay here and hide.

actions.dialog_text: Stay quiet, everyone. We’ll be safer if we don’t make any noise.
actions.plan: The shooter is still in the building, and I’m too scared to move. I’ll stay hidden here and hope they don’t come this way.

actions.dialog_text: Elijah, stay down. We can’t let them find us.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, but I can’t risk moving. I’ll stay hidden and hope they don’t find us.

memories.description: I decided to ask Elijah and Evelyn for feedback on my monologue to prepare for my audition.
I heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the classroom, believing movement would increase danger.
I remained hidden in the classroom, too scared to move, and urged everyone to stay quiet to avoid attracting the shooter.
I stayed hidden in the classroom as the shooter moved closer, urging Elijah to remain quiet and still.
